basics.name: Alex Mercer
basics.label: Senior DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
basics.summary: Data-driven DevOps expert with over 8 years of experience building elite CI/CD pipelines, provisioning secure Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and designing highly available cloud architectures. Specializes in transforming legacy systems into automated, containerized GitOps engines.

highlights: Migrated a multi-tenant enterprise suite to a GitOps model using ArgoCD, reducing deployment times by 72%.
Architected scalable, compliance-hardened AWS landing zones using Terraform, securing over $12M in ARR infrastructure.
Implemented automated Canary deployments, shrinking production incident windows from hours to seconds.
Orchestrated a zero-downtime migration of 450+ microservices to Kubernetes (EKS).
Designed optimized GitHub Actions templates used by 80+ developers, decreasing pipeline blockages by 40%.
Established unified telemetry structures with Prometheus and Grafana, saving $80k annually in redundant monitoring SaaS bills.

projects.title: HyperPipeline Core
projects.description: An open-source container vulnerability scanner engineered to run inline within Git workflows, auto-blocking unauthorized Docker pushes.

projects.title: Zero-Trust IaC Boilerplate
projects.description: Enterprise-ready Terraform configurations for zero-trust VPC patterns, featuring dynamic IAM restriction patterns.
